caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is positioned in a recording studio, sitting before a professional condenser microphone and wearing large black over-ear headphones. He is dressed in a black zippered jacket over a grey shirt. The background consists of dark, textured acoustic foam panels arranged in a ribbed pattern. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression and gaze shift subtly. Initially, he looks forward with a neutral expression. He then glances toward his right, his eyes shifting away from the center. He returns to a forward-facing position before ending with a slight, tight-lipped smile and narrowed eyes, as if reacting to something. The microphone, mounted on a black boom arm with visible gold-colored connectors, remains stationary throughout the scene. No text or logos are visible in the frames.
